ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family embracing.  The arms will move in a way that suggests protection and togetherness. The sequence starts with arms outstretched, then moves into a hugging position, and finally settles into a gentle embrace. I will use the dual shoulder joints to achieve the natural flow of the movements.  The arms don't have elbows, so I will focus on the shoulder movement to simulate the embrace. The wrists will be slightly rotated to enhance the feeling of a warm embrace.

frames.beat: arms begin to draw closer, a gentle pull
the arms meet in the center, a soft connection
a warm family hug, holding each other close
